title: Allow RC Windows Installer to be built
body:
The windows installer doesn't like -rc's because it's not strictly semver, but this error can be suppressed.

comments.body: @l0rd PTAL. This is mostly untested as my windows env is not up and running ATM, but if I've gotten this wrong, feel free to close and open up a fix, as that's probably faster.
